title: Research
text: This research direction explores metasurface-based optical computing architectures, including diffractive neural networks, to achieve multidimensional, high-capacity, and parallel information processing.

title: Research
text: This research direction explores metasurface-based optical computing architectures, including diffractive neural networks, to achieve multidimensional, high-capacity, and parallel information processing.

title: Research
section: 2. Structured Light Field Manipulation and Detection
text:
2. Structured Light Field Manipulation and Detection
This research direction explores the generation, control, and detection of complex structured light fields, including vortex beams, vector optical fields, and optical skyrmions.

title: Research
text:
3. High-dimensional Imaging and Sensing
This research direction aims to integrate metasurface encoders with image sensors for multidimensional optical field sensing and imaging, including depth, three-dimensional, spectral, and polarization information.

title: Sample Project Title
text:
This project explores a metasurface-enabled optical information processing architecture.



The project combines physical optical encoding with computational reconstruction.



I designed the concept, simulation framework, and system validation pipeline.

title: Home
text:
李效欣，物理学博士，哈尔滨工业大学物理学院本硕博，研究方向是超表面光计算与光感知芯片。



超构表面（Metasurfaces）
自由空间光计算（Free Space Optical Computing）
多维度计算成像（Multi-Demonsion Computational Imaging）
结构光场调控（Structured Light Field Modulation）
集成超构芯片/传感器（Integrated Meta-optics Chip/Sensor）











Using metasurfaces for optical encoding and task-oriented information processing.








Exploring optical computation under practical incoherent illumination conditions.



 Integrating metasurfaces with imaging sensors for spectral and polarization reconstruction.

title: About
text:
李效欣，物理学博士，目前于杭州北京航天航空大学国际创新研究院绿色光子国际研究中心从事博士后研究。本、硕和博士均毕业于哈尔滨工业大学物理学院，博士生导师为丁卫强教授。毕业后加入北航国新院从事博士后，合作导师为王浩教授。 研究领域聚焦于纳米光子学，主要包括基于超表面的多维度并行光计算、超表面集成的高维光场感知芯片与超表面多维度光场调控等，近年来发表论文20余篇，包括Nature Communications、ACS Photonics、Advanced Optical Materials、Advanced photonics Nexus等，申请及授权相关发明专利8项，多次参与中国国际大学生创新大赛并获得金奖等。



2021-2026 博士，哈尔滨工业大学 物理学院 微纳光学
2019-2021 硕士，哈尔滨工业大学 物理学院 光学
2015-2019 本科，哈尔滨工业大学 理学院 光电信息科学与工程





Metasurface optics
Diffractive optical computing
Incoherent optical convolution
Spectral-polarimetric imaging
Integrated meta-optical systems
